label: Normalization & standardization

node.label: Normalization & standardization
node.definition: Activation or feature scales are standardized to improve conditioning and stability.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Normalization & standardization is modeled as depending on Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors and feeding downstream nodes such as Convolutional neural networks, ResNets & DenseNets, Transformers.
examples: atlas downstream link to Convolutional neural networks
atlas downstream link to ResNets & DenseNets
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
